title: stillingia angustifolia
intro: Stillingia angustifolia, also known as Queen's Root or Yellowroot, is a perennial plant native to North America, particularly in the eastern and central regions. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic compounds, which help alleviate pain and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Stillingia angustifolia include treating arthritis, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as aiding in the relief of fever and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be taken internally or applied topically to experience its medicinal effects.
